ddls:
CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "school_type" TEXT /* Type of school (e.g., District, Charter) */,
  "num_students" INTEGER /* Total number of students enrolled */,
  "budget" REAL /* Total budget allocated to the school */,
  "budget_per_student" REAL /* Budget allocated per student */,
  "principal_name" TEXT /* Name of the school's principal */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the school */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "email" TEXT /* School's email address */,
  "website" TEXT /* School's official website */,
  "school_rating" TEXT /* Overall rating of the school (e.g., A, B, C) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score record */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school providing the scores */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the academic year */,
  "avg_math_score" REAL /* Average math score of students */,
  "avg_reading_score" REAL /* Average reading score of students */,
  "percent_passing_math" REAL /* Percentage of students passing math */,
  "percent_passing_reading" REAL /* Percentage of students passing reading */,
  "overall_passing_rate" REAL /* Overall passing rate across subjects */,
  "num_students_tested" INTEGER /* Number of students tested */,
  "improvement_rate" REAL /* Year-over-year improvement rate in scores */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_school_scores_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES school_years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_school_scores_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budgets" (
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget entry */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school being budgeted for */,
  "fiscal_year" TEXT /* Fiscal year of the budget allocation */,
  "allocated_budget" REAL /* Total budget allocated for the fiscal year */,
  "actual_spent" REAL /* Actual amount spent from the budget */,
  "budget_category" TEXT /* Category of the budget (e.g., Operational, Capital) */,
  "budget_source" TEXT /* Source of the budget (e.g., Government, Grants) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("budget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budgets_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school the student is enrolled in */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the student */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the student */,
  "grade" INTEGER /* Current grade level of the student */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student was enrolled */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Student's date of birth */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Student's gender */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Student's ethnicity */,
  "parent_contact" TEXT /* Contact information of the parent/guardian */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teachers" (
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each teacher */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school employing the teacher */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the teacher */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the teacher */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject taught by the teacher */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the teacher was hired */,
  "qualification" TEXT /* Teacher's highest qualification */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Years of teaching experience */,
  "email" TEXT /* Teacher's email address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("teacher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teachers_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subjects" (
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subject */,
  "subject_name" TEXT /* Name of the subject */,
  "grade_level" INTEGER /* Grade level for which the subject is offered */,
  "subject_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the subject */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollment" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student enrolled */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the subject in which the student is enrolled */,
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the teacher teaching the subject */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester of enrollment (e.g., Fall, Spring) */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date of enrollment */,
  "grade_received" TEXT /* Grade received by the student in the subject */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollment_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollment_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollment_teacher_id FOREIGN KEY ("teacher_id") REFERENCES teachers ("teacher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_scores" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test score record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student taking the test */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the subject of the test */,
  "score" REAL /* Score achieved by the student */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date the test was conducted */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of test (e.g., Midterm, Final) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_scores_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_scores_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendance" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school the student attends */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the attendance record */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of attendance (e.g., Present, Absent) */,
  "attendance_type" TEXT /* Type of attendance (e.g., Full Day, Half Day) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the teacher being reviewed */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the reviewer (could be another teacher or admin) */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the performance review */,
  "score" REAL /* Score given in the review */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments regarding the performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reviews_teacher_id FOREIGN KEY ("teacher_id") REFERENCES teachers ("teacher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user account */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for account login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, teacher, student) */,
  "email" TEXT /* User's email address */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each academic year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Name or description of the academic year */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the academic year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the academic year */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Indicates if the year is the current academic year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)
